description:
A lightweight, developer-focused database management tool. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL and SQLite. Hackable with plugins. Built for speed, security, and aesthetics.


See the assets to download this version and install.
What's Changed
- check and improve readability of all themes by @thomaswasle in #139
- feat: add demo videos by @Nako0 in #142
New Contributors
- @Nako0 made their first contribution in #142
Full Changelog: v0.9.19...v0.9.20
